'''bazhowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jocolatte|jocolatte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jocolatte|jocolatte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bazhowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzheweth|bæzheweth]] || [[word:bæzhewej|bæzhewej]] || [[word:bæzhewesh|bæzhewesh]] || [[word:bæzhewe|bæzhewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhozhowoth|bazhozhowoth]] || [[word:bazhozhowoj|bazhozhowoj]] || [[word:bazhozhowosh|bazhozhowosh]] || [[word:bazhozhowo|bazhozhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhowoth|bazhowoth]] || [[word:bazhowoj|bazhowoj]] || [[word:bazhowosh|bazhowosh]] || [[word:bazhowo|bazhowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhofwoth|bazhofwoth]] || [[word:bazhofwoj|bazhofwoj]] || [[word:bazhofwosh|bazhofwosh]] || [[word:bazhofwof|bazhofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhowotho|bazhowotho]] || [[word:bazhowojo|bazhowojo]] || [[word:bazhowosho|bazhowosho]] || [[word:bazhowoko|bazhowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhowoth|bazhowoth]] || [[word:bazhowoj|bazhowoj]] || [[word:bazhowosh|bazhowosh]] || [[word:bazhowo|bazhowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhowothol|bazhowothol]] || [[word:bazhowojol|bazhowojol]] || [[word:bazhowoshol|bazhowoshol]] || [[word:bazhowokol|bazhowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhowothotho|bazhowothotho]] || [[word:bazhowojojo|bazhowojojo]] || [[word:bazhowoshosho|bazhowoshosho]] || [[word:bazhowoko|bazhowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhowothon|bazhowothon]] || [[word:bazhowojon|bazhowojon]] || [[word:bazhowoshon|bazhowoshon]] || [[word:bazhowokon|bazhowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhowothoro|bazhowothoro]] || [[word:bazhowojoro|bazhowojoro]] || [[word:bazhowoshoro|bazhowoshoro]] || [[word:bazhowokoro|bazhowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
